title: Hugging Face and Cerebras show a low-latency open voice AI stack with Gemma 4
friendlyTitle: Hugging Face and Cerebras make voice AI respond faster
summary: Hugging Face and Cerebras demonstrated a real-time speech-to-speech pipeline using Nvidia Parakeet for speech recognition, Gemma 4 31B VLM on Cerebras for inference, and Alibaba Qwen3TTS for speech output.
friendlySummary: They showed a voice AI system that listens, thinks and talks back using open parts from several AI projects.
whyItMatters: Voice AI succeeds or fails on latency, especially the slow long-tail responses that make conversations feel broken. Open, replaceable components give builders a clearer path to practical voice assistants, robots and customer-service agents.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Faster voice AI feels more natural. This could make phone agents, robots and personal assistants less awkward to use.
